case_title: SMITH, ANTHONY VS JEFFREY, JOHN TRUSTEE FOR CALVIN COOLIDGE JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,266.31 FILED BY SMITH, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY, JOHN TRUSTEE FOR CALVIN COOLIDGE JOHNSON REVOCABLE TRUST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEFFREY, JOHN TRUSTEE FOR CALVIN COOLIDGE JOHNSON REVOCABLE TRUST $3,166.31 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,218.31, THE BILL OF SALE CONTRACT BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT IS RESCINDED FOR THE PURCHASE OF THE 1989 CADILLAC SEDAN VIN #1G6CD515XK4363560. CONCURRENTLY WITH THE PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, THE PLAINTIFF SHALL TRANSFER THE TITLE OF THE VEHICLE BACK TO CALVIN C JOHNSON, DEFENDANT OR TO THE CALVIN COOLIDGE JOHNSON REVOCABLE TRUST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY, JOHN TRUSTEE FOR CALVIN COOLIDGE JOHNSON
